name: Rock Candy
recipeIngredient: 1/2 teaspoon oil (flavored with lemon, cloves, peppermint, spearmint, wintergreen, cinnamon)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cool the mixture of sugar, water, and Karo syrup to 290 degrees Fahrenheit on a candy thermometer.
2. Add the coloring and oil, then stir until combined.
3. Pour the mixture into a buttered pan.
4. Allow it to cool completely before breaking it into pieces. Work quickly once it has cooled sufficiently.
